rules.message: AES ECB mode leaks plaintext patterns and should not be used for sensitive data.
rules.remediation: Replace ECB with GCM, CTR, or CBC with authentication

rules.message: ECB mode object detected; ECB should not be used for sensitive data.
rules.remediation: Use GCM, CTR, or CBC+HMAC instead

rules.message: Legacy block cipher detected; migrate to AES or ChaCha20.
rules.remediation: Replace DES/3DES with AES-256 or ChaCha20

rules.message: Deprecated hash algorithm detected; use SHA-256, SHA-512, or SHA3-256.
rules.remediation: Replace with SHA-256, SHA-512, or SHA3

rules.message: RSA key size below 2048 bits detected; use at least 2048 bits, prefer 4096.
rules.remediation: Generate RSA key with minimum 2048 bits (4096 recommended)

rules.message: RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 padding is vulnerable to padding oracle attacks; use OAEP instead.
PBKDF2 iteration count appears low for modern password-derived key material; use ≥100000.
rules.remediation: Increase iterations to at least 100,000 (or use Argon2)

rules.message: Non-cryptographic random source detected; use os.urandom() or secrets module for crypto.
CBC mode requires proper authentication and random IV handling; verify HMAC or AEAD is used.
rules.remediation: Use CBC with HMAC-SHA256 or prefer GCM/ChaCha20-Poly1305

rules.message: ChaCha20 detected; ensure nonce is unique per encryption with the same key.
rules.remediation: Use unique 96-bit nonce for each encryption operation

rules.message: AEAD mode detected; verify proper nonce handling and tag verification.
rules.note: Best practice pattern detected; ensure implementation follows AEAD guidelines

rules.message: Argon2 detected (modern password hashing); verify memory/time parameters are appropriate.
Scrypt detected; ensure cost parameters (N, r, p) are appropriate for the use case.
bcrypt detected; verify cost factor is at least 12 for password hashing.
rules.note: Good password hashing algorithm with built-in cost factor
High-level API with good defaults; suitable for most use cases

rules.message: HMAC detected; verify hash algorithm is SHA-256 or stronger.
rules.note: Message authentication code with hash function

rules.message: Cryptographically secure RNG detected (os.urandom, secrets module).
